product: Stork Solutions Aquatics Series Calibration Suite
release_notes: V1.2.5: UI enhancements - cleaner header/comment blocks; smaller, more readable tabs (pH, TDS, Level, Serial & ID); redesigned Serial & ID tab with side-by-side cards; frosted-glass Results log showing background image; Identity/Setup tab transparent matching other tabs; notebook tabs no longer resize on selection; removed 9-point and 11-point level sequences; Mensor datum forced to GAUGE at calibration start.
